title: QoL Refined
description: A feature set of QoL addons I believe the game ought to have
body:
An evergrowing library (gradually) of QoL features I believe Minecraft is lacking OR would like to have the option to see in-game. Most will be simple, some will be a bit more advanced, but all-in-all, it should enhance the game

Currently Implemented:
- **Lava Haze Effect**

  Simple Haze Overylay Effect when in close proximity to any lava source. I like it
- **Durability Border Notification**

  Simple border colour flash when durability reaches 60/30 % respectively
- **Chest/Inventory Sorting**

  Simple Chest/Inventory sorting function, and sort-setting
- **Quick Deposit Items in Chest**

  Simple way to deposit items into chests. If the held item(s) exists in chest, Shift + Left-Click deposits held item(s). If the held item(s) does not exist in chest, Shift + Double Left-Click deposits held item(s).
- **Crawl Function**

  Simple Crawl function. (Default Keybind: C)


(Each setting/feature is toggle-able in the JSON config file(will add Mod Menu comp soon™))
